title: “See You At Work Tomorrow!” Premieres To No. 1 Ratings
content:
tvN’s new Monday-Tuesday drama “See You at Work Tomorrow!” has premiered! On June 22, the new rom-com drama “See You at Work Tomorrow!” starring Seo In Guk and Park Ji Hyun premiered to No. 1 in ratings with an average nationwide viewership rating of 4.8 percent.
